meta.question: Which model has a task named 'Trenutak dobijanjadetaljnog opisa problema'?
meta.finalAnswer: The task named 'Trenutak dobijanja detaljnog opisa problema' (note: the actual task name includes spaces: "Trenutak dobijanja detaljnog opisa problema") belongs to the model named **"Koreografija"**.

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type ?comment WHERE {
  ?elem bbo:name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Trenutak dobijanjadetaljnog opisa problema")))
  ?elem a ?type .
  OPTIONAL { ?elem rdfs:comment ?comment . }
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type ?comment WHERE {
  ?elem bbo:name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("dobijanja")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("problema")))
  ?elem a ?type .
  OPTIONAL { ?elem rdfs:comment ?comment . }
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?model ?modelName WHERE {
  ?task bbo:name "Trenutak dobijanja detaljnog opisa problema" .
  ?task tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model a bboExt:Model .
  ?model bbo:name ?modelName .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found the task and traced it back to its model. The task "Trenutak dobijanja detaljnog opisa problema" belongs to the model named "Koreografija".
